name: Hidden Hugs Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package HERSHEY'S HUGS or HUGS WITH ALMONDS chocolates (8 oz)
3/4 cup Toasted almonds, finely ground (see note)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Remove wrappers from chocolate pieces.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat together butter, powdered sugar, and vanilla until well blended.
4. Stir flour and salt into the butter mixture. Gradually add this to the butter mixture, beating until well combined.
5. Add nuts; blend thoroughly.
6. Scoop a scant tablespoon of dough around each chocolate piece, ensuring it is completely covered.
7. Shape into balls and place on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until set. Allow to cool slightly, then roll in powdered sugar.
9. Cool completely. Before serving, roll again in powdered sugar if desired.
Note: To toast almonds, preheat the oven to 350°F. Spread almonds in a thin layer in a shallow baking pan and bake for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until light golden brown. Allow to cool.
